About.title: Who is Dr. Mulkie?
About.paragraph: A PhD in Community Entrepreneurship and Spatial Identity, combining academic depth with field expertise to help entrepreneurs and organizations build their identity and achieve their true impact. Working with clients from Muscat, Riyadh, Dubai, and Berlin.

Hero.description1End: , combining academic depth with field expertise to help entrepreneurs and organizations build their identity and achieve their true impact.
Hero.description2End: to transform their ideas into projects with a clear identity and future vision.

growth.title: Growth Strategy
growth.description: Specialized guidance to expand your business scope and build an influential presence in your field.

roadmap.title: Project Roadmap
roadmap.description: Building a clear, phased plan to develop your project or transform your idea into reality.

diagnosis.title: Brand Diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Deep analysis of your current identity and discovering the gaps preventing you from standing out in the market.

Process.title: How does the consultation session work?

register.title: Fill out the registration form
register.description: Answer short questions to help Dr. Mulkie understand your project beforehand

confirm.title: Appointment confirmation
confirm.description: You will receive session confirmation within 24 hours

session.title: Focused consulting session
session.description: A deep, personalized discussion about your situation and needs

actionable.title: Clear actionable steps
actionable.description: The session ends with actionable recommendations

CTA.title: Are you ready to take your project to the next level?
CTA.description: Book your consultation with Dr. Mulkie now — answer a few short questions and we'll reach out to confirm your appointment.
CTA.ctaButton: Click here to register and book your appointment

form.socialMedia: Social Media Account or Project Website *
form.natureOfProject: Nature of the project and services it provides? *
form.biggestChallenge: What is the biggest challenge (problem) you are facing now? *
form.expectation: What do you expect to achieve from this consultation? *
form.source: How did you hear about Dr. Mulkie? *

stages.idea: An idea that hasn't launched yet

Footer.brandDesc: Helping entrepreneurs and organizations build their identity and achieve their true impact through practical strategies in entrepreneurship and spatial identity.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Subscribe to receive the latest articles and tips directly in your inbox.

Form.pageSubtitle: Answer the following questions so we can prepare your session

q1.label: Your full name, job title / role in the project

q5.label: Your project / organization name — what does it do and what are your main services or products?
q5.placeholder: Organization name, activity, and key services

q6.label: When did your project launch? What is its current stage?

options.idea: An idea that hasn't launched yet

q7.label: Who is your ideal customer? Do you target a specific audience?

q8.label: What marketing channels do you currently use?

q9.label: What sets your project apart? Why do customers choose you?

q10.label: Biggest challenge you face now — have you tried previous solutions?
q10.placeholder: Biggest challenge and solutions you've tried

q11.label: What is your goal from this consultation? What do you hope to achieve in 3 months?

q12.label: Would you like to add any other information before the session?

success.title: Thank you! Your request has been received
success.body: Dr. Mulkie or her team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your session.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number (digits only)
